Previous response had warnings:

- Extra text detected after JSON object

New Terminal Output:

}user@805564a713ca:~/migration$ cat /home/user/migration/remove_packages.sh
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-generated script to remove unnecessary packages
# Generated for cloud migration cleanup

set -e

echo "The following packages will be removed:"
echo "apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client redis-tools strace tcpdump tree vim wget"
echo ""
echo "Dry run (no changes will be made):"
apt-get remove --dry-run apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client redis-tools strace tcpdu
mp tree vim wget

echo ""
echo "To actually remove these packages, run:"
echo "sudo apt-get remove -y apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client redis-tools strace t
cpdump tree vim wget"

# Uncomment the following line to perform actual removal:
# apt-get remove -y apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client redis-tools strace tcpdump tr
ee vim wget
user@805564a713ca:~/migration$ file /home/user/migration/remove_packages.sh
bash: file: command not found
user@805564a713ca:~/migration$
